---
description: "Design a project-specific ICM workspace from the builder outputs"
argument-hint: "Project name or path to approved stage-map.md"
agent: "agent"
---

Design a project-specific ICM workspace using the current builder outputs.

Use `stages/02_stage_mapping/output/stage-map.md`, `stages/03_scaffold/output/scaffold-plan.md`, and `stages/04_questionnaire/output/setup-questionnaire.md` if they exist. Produce a concise implementation plan that lists the project-specific folders, stage contracts, reference files, and validation checks that should be created next.

Do not create files until the human approves the scaffold plan.
